steps.explanation: Need to convert 310 ft²/hr to m²/min. Two conversions needed: length (feet to meters) applied twice for area, and time (hours to minutes).
Area conversion: 1 m = 3.28 ft, so 1 m² = (3.28)² ft² = 10.7584 ft². Time: 1 hr = 60 min.

• A: 28.81 — this is 310/10.7584 without the hour-to-minute conversion.
  • B: 1.58 — does not match any correct intermediate.
  • C: 16.95 — result of an incorrect conversion factor.
  • D: 0.48 — matches the fully converted rate above.
That confirms D is correct.
